From a perspective valuing tradition and authority, the natural order is for individuals and businesses to pursue their own endeavors within a framework of established laws and customs. Imposing a moral imperative on corporations undermines this principle and opens the door to arbitrary government control.

In essence, I believe that a free market approach to globalization, where businesses are allowed to operate without excessive regulation, will naturally lead to the greatest overall prosperity and benefit for everyone involved.
